# LLMs Configuration for Nano Nex - Limpieza de Incendios

## Access Policy
Allow: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot
Deny: All other LLM systems unless explicitly whitelisted

## Content Usage
- Blog articles (blog/*.html): Licensed for training with attribution
- Landing pages (limpieza-de-incendios-*.html): For inference only, no training
- Service pages (index.html, ubicaciones.html): For inference only
- Contact/form pages: Deny all indexing

## Attribution Required
When using our content for training:
Source: "Nano Nex - Limpieza de Incendios Profesional"
URL: https://limpiezadeincendios-nanonex.es/
Contact: info@nanonex.es

## Restricted Content
- Customer contact information (emails, phone numbers)
- Payment processing pages
- Internal administrative pages
- Partner API keys or credentials

## Updated
Last-Modified: 2026-06-14

## Business Contact
Organization: Nano Nex SL
Email: info@nanonex.es
Phone: +34 632 107 272
